data.chapter_title_en: Words of remembrance for morning and evening
data.arabic_text: ((أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ)) (مِائَةَ مَرَّةٍ فِي الْيَوْمِ).
data.english_text: ‘I seek Allaah’s forgiveness and I turn to Him in repentance.’ [one hundred times a day]

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: Astaghfirullaaha wa 'atoobu 'ilayhi[one hundred times a day]
